creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: Repology be repology, but what ultimately matters is what upstream decides for mainstream development and support moving forward, which looks to be gcr-4/gck-2. As such, plus the primary consumers being GNOME 40+ components, gcr-4/gck-2 should be in the security/gcr port with gcr-3/gck-1 in security/gcr3.
